name: @tplog/zendcli
description: Minimal Zendesk CLI for tickets and comments

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/cli.js && node -e "const f='dist/cli.js';const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))"
